urdu transliteration text:
AYE FARISHTON MUJHE KARBALA LE CHALO
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: O Angels, please take me to Karbala…

urdu transliteration text:
APNE MAULA KE KADMO KO CHUMUNGA MAI
FARSH SE ARSH KOH AAJ CHUMUNGA MAI
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I will kiss the feet of my MasterFrom this earth, I will kiss the sky today

urdu transliteration text:
YEH IBADAT KOH HARGIZ NA BHULUNGA MAI
TUMKO ALLAH KA WASTA LE CHALO
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I will never forget this worship,I plead you in the name of God, please take me…

urdu transliteration text:
HAQ ADAAI HU MAI TUMKO MAALUM HAI
EK FIDAAI HU MAI TUMKO MALUM HAI
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: You know that I am not ungratefulYou know that I am in love(with Ahlul Bayt)

urdu transliteration text:
KARBALAAI HU MAI TUMKO MALUM HAI
MERI MAYYAT YAHA SE UTHA LE CHALO
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: You know that I am a KarbalaaiPlease carry my dead body and take me there…

urdu transliteration text:
YEH LAHAD TOH NAHI HAI THIKANA MERA
YAANI HAI AB WAHI AAB DAANA MERA
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: This grave is not the final destination for me. This means that now my water and food is provided therein

urdu transliteration text:
BAN GAYA HAI WAHI AASHYANA MERA
YAA NAJAF MUJHKO YA NAINAVA LE CHALO
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: This has become my abode nowPlease take me either to Najaf or Nainawa (Karbala)

urdu transliteration text:
SAR KE BAL AAJ CHALTA HUA AA JAUGA
HAI IRAADA YAHI SAMARRAH JAUGA
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I will crawl and come backI intend to go to Samarra

urdu transliteration text:
MAI KHURASAN NAJAF KARBALA JAAUNGA
KHULD JAHA HAI MUJHE US JAGAH LE CHALO
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I will go to Khurasaan, Najaf and Karbala. Where the heaven is on earth, please take me there…

urdu transliteration text:
ALLAH GHAAZI KA ROBO HASHAM
SEENAE AAB PAR USNE GAARDA ALAM
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: O God! The might and authority of Ghaazi (Abbas A.S). He planted his flag in the chest of the river

urdu transliteration text:
SOCHA SAHIL PE YEH BEHRE AHLE HARAM
DOSH PAR RAKHKE YEH ALQAMA LE CHALO
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: He thought at the banks of river, for the sake of the families. Carry water on my shoulders and take me there…

urdu transliteration text:
AI ABAD MERI JANNAT HAI KARBOBALA
MERI MATTI ME HAI ISHQE AALE IBAA
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: O Abad (poet), my paradise is Karbobala. The love of Ahlul Bayt is deeply ground with my clay (essence)

urdu transliteration text:
KUCH NAI CHAYE MUJHKO USKE SIWAA
SUE DAAMANE AHLE KISA LE CHALO
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I don’t want anything besides, The presence of Ahle Kisa (the people of the cloak), so please take me there…
